overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in a red coat ascending a grand stone staircase in a historic urban setting during golden hour. The character passes a descending pedestrian, reaches the top of the stairs, and walks along a misty riverside promenade lined with ornate street lamps and autumn trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic stone staircase between high walls

events.description: passing a descending pedestrian on the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone stairs between tall stone walls

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the ego character, passing on the left side

entered.detail: wide stone stairs ascending between stone walls
tall beige stone wall with horizontal lines
dark stone balustrade with decorative pillars
classical multi-globe street lamp attached to the wall

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a grand stone staircase flanked by high stone walls. The scene is shaded and enclosed, with ornate classical lamp posts visible along the left wall. Around 8 seconds, the character passes an NPC walking down the stairs.

agents.ego_description: continuing the ascent up the long stone staircase

entered.detail: tall modern buildings visible in the distance beyond the railing

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the staircase, now higher up with distant city buildings becoming visible through the mist on the right. The lamp posts move closer as the character climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase exit transitioning to open promenade

events.description: exiting the shadow of the stairwell into bright golden hour sunlight
character reaches the top of stairs and turns left onto the promenade

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of the stairs, transitioning from ascent to walking along the open promenade

entered.detail: ornate metal railing along the edge of the walkway overlooking the city
wide wet concrete walkway with reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the shaded staircase into bright golden hour sunlight, creating a strong backlight effect. After reaching the top step, the character turns left onto a wide promenade with ornate railings overlooking the city.

events.description: passing a pedestrian standing on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the misty promenade past street lamps and autumn trees

notable_agents.action: standing still on the promenade, facing toward the ego character

entered.detail: trees with orange and brown autumn foliage lining the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open promenade, passing ornate street lamps and autumn trees. The scene is bathed in warm golden light with atmospheric mist. Around 42 seconds, the character passes a stationary pedestrian standing on the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a shaded, enclosed stone staircase into a wide, sun-drenched riverside promenade. It begins within the cool shadows of high stone walls and classical lamp posts, moving upward as the character passes a descending pedestrian. As the climb continues, the environment gradually opens up, revealing distant city buildings through a light mist that clings to the right side of the stairs. The scene then shifts abruptly from shade to brilliant golden hour sunlight upon reaching the summit, where the camera follows the character turning left onto an open walkway with ornate railings. Finally, the movement flows along the promenade through a landscape of autumn trees and atmospheric haze, passing a stationary pedestrian under the warm glow of the setting sun.
